title: Canadian Duck Wrap
description: A fusion of Indian flavors with a Canadian twist, featuring duck and wrap in a delicious and energizing dish.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt, black pepper, and garam masala.
Brush sesame oil on both sides of the duck breast.
Place the duck breast on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the Indian wraps in a toaster or oven for a few minutes.
Slice the roasted duck breast into thin strips.
Assemble the wraps by placing the duck strips on one half of the wrap, followed by cucumber slices and cilantro.
Drizzle mint chutney on top of the duck and wrap.
Fold the wrap in half to serve.
